subject: Contract expired: {player}
body:
The contract of {player} has expired and the player has left {team}.

{player} is now a free agent. If you wish to retain their services, you will need to negotiate a new contract.

Please review your squad and consider your options.

es.subject: Contrato expirado: {player}
es.body:
El contrato de {player} ha expirado y el jugador ha dejado {team}.

{player} es ahora agente libre. Si desea retener sus servicios, deberá negociar un nuevo contrato.

Revise su plantilla y considere sus opciones.
